history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, medium shot of a young East Asian person with dark hair styled in a messy bun with loose strands framing their face. They are wearing a black jacket or coat over a black top and have distinct black markings on their face: a horizontal line drawn across their eyes, with two vertical lines extending downwards from the horizontal line, creating an 'X' shape over each eye. Their mouth is slightly open, revealing teeth and pink lips. Their right hand is raised, showing three fingers extended in a peace sign. The background is a lightly textured, pale-colored wall, possibly with a subtle striped pattern. The lighting appears to be soft and diffused, possibly from an indoor source, casting a gentle glow on the subject's face. The overall mood is playful and edgy, with a touch of a cosplay or costume aesthetic. The color palette is dominated by black and pale neutrals.
